title: bromus intermedius var. requienii
intro: Bromus intermedius var. requienii, also known as requien's brome or requien's bromegrass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Bromus intermedius var. requienii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
